ham.subject: Jira ticket resolved: [PROJ-123] – Database migration complete
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I wanted to let you know that the Jira ticket PROJ-123 has been closed and the database migration is now complete. The migration was performed last night during the scheduled maintenance window and all databases are back online.

Key points:
- Migration finished at 2:13 AM UTC.
- All services are operational and no errors were logged.
- The new schema version is 2.4.1, which includes the performance optimizations we discussed.

Please review the commit on GitHub (repo: core‑db‑migrate) and let me know if you spot any regressions. I’ve attached the migration logs for your reference.

Thanks for your patience and cooperation.

Best regards,

Rachel Lee
Lead Database Engineer
Tech Solutions Division

spam.subject: Important: Your Microsoft 365 Password Will Expire Soon – Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Microsoft 365 User,

This is an automated notification from Microsoft Security Services. Your current Microsoft 365 account password is set to expire in 48 hours. To avoid any disruption to your services, you must update your password immediately.

Please follow the secure link below to verify your identity and reset your password:
<URL>

If you do not update your password before the expiry date, your access to Outlook, Teams, SharePoint, and other Microsoft 365 services will be suspended.

For assistance, contact the Microsoft 365 Help Desk at 1‑800‑642‑7676 or reply to this email.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

Microsoft 365 Security Team
